suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Register a `bugfix-worker` skill (or replace feature `skillName` values with an existing skill) so implementation workers can follow assigned procedures without immediate skill resolution failures.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review report for fix-data-integrity-bugs cites transcript evidence that `Skill("bugfix-worker")` failed because the skill was not found.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Define required behavior when `.factory/services.yaml` and `.factory/library/` are absent (either provide those artifacts in mission setup or explicitly document fallback validator-discovery behavior).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviewer and validator setup both observed missing `.factory/services.yaml` and `.factory/library/` paths in this repository.

rejectedObservations.observation: Create `.factory/services.yaml` automatically in-repo during scrutiny runs when missing.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous: service manifest schema/content for this project is not present, so generating one here risks adding incorrect operational commands.
